meta.title: Top-3 Cloud Frontier-Inference Provider Concentration in 2028
meta.question: By Dec 31 2028, what share of cloud frontier-inference revenue will the top-3 providers hold?
meta.resolution: Top-3 by cloud frontier-inference revenue Q4 2028, per IDC/Gartner/company 10-Ks. Likely candidate set: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, AWS Bedrock-aggregated, Azure OpenAI-aggregated, Alibaba/Tencent

priorJustifications.H1: Fragmented (<50% top-3) is unlikely given current consolidation trajectory toward OpenAI/Anthropic/Google + hyperscaler distribution.
priorJustifications.H2: Concentrating but below oligopoly threshold (50-70%) — plausible if open-source models gain enterprise share.
priorJustifications.H3: Oligopoly threshold (70-85%) is modal given current trajectory.
priorJustifications.H4: Channel inheritance + capex moats at frontier-training scale + winner-take-most quality dynamics. Search (Google ~90%), mobile OS (iOS+Android ~99%), public-cloud IaaS top-3 trending past 65% — concentration ceilings in adjacent digital-infra markets routinely exceed 85%. Not a tail; a live shoulder.

meta.definitionalNote: Aggregation rules (Bedrock-aggregated, Azure-OpenAI-aggregated) materially affect measured concentration. To be specified in resolution criterion before Phase 3.
redTeamGapsAddressed: Frontier-inference provider concentration: OpenAI ($25B) + Anthropic ($44B) dominate but distribution across hyperscalers post-Apr 27
Reference class: cloud top-3 share 43% (2014) → 56% (2018) → 68% (2026) — plateau in H2-H3 boundary
Neoclouds (CoreWeave $5.13B, Together $300M, Lambda $500M, Fireworks) growing but still small vs $268B top-3 cloud
FTC/DOJ antitrust scrutiny exists but Trump admin pro-consolidation; major hyperscaler M&A unlikely blocked
OpenAI selling on AWS Bedrock/Vertex post-exclusivity = revenue distribution across cloud channels
meta.priorRevisionRationale: Round 2 found: (a) Cloud top-3 plateaued ~65-70% — 4yr projection from 68% lands H2-H3 boundary. (b) OpenAI distribution across hyperscalers (post-Apr 27) reduces channel concentration even as provider concentration holds. (c) Anthropic $44B ARR growing fast but on multiple clouds. (d) Neoclouds adding fragmentation pressure (~$15-20B combined). Net: H1 down 2pp (less fragmentation than open-weights signal alone suggested), H2 down 2pp (concentration edges higher), H3 up 4pp (oligopoly threshold trajectory most aligned with cloud-history reference class), H4 stays at 0.10 (extreme concentration unlikely with open weights at 67% enterprise + neoclouds growing).
meta.lensSetReason: Initial lens set during topic creation per skills/news-scan.md mapping

issues: Unfalsifiable hypotheses: H1, H2, H3, H4
Near-maximum uncertainty — model is not discriminating

blockers: NON-UNIFORM PRIORS without justification — posteriors are {'H1': 0.18, 'H2': 0.4, 'H3': 0.32, 'H4': 0.1} but posteriorHistory has no initial note explaining the asymmetry. Add a posteriorHistory entry documenting why.
warnings: meta.resolution may not be objectively observable — does it describe something a third party could verify?
No anti-indicators defined — every hypothesis needs at least one indicator that would REDUCE its probability

_design_rules: Each indicator must be OBSERVABLE — actions, not opinions
Each must have a clear fired/not-fired threshold
Every hypothesis needs at least one pro AND one anti indicator
Governor flags unfalsifiable hypotheses as DEGRADED

tier1_critical.desc: Q4 2027 IDC/Gartner cloud frontier-inference revenue tracker reports top-3 provider share >=85%.
Q4 2027 IDC/Gartner cloud frontier-inference revenue tracker reports top-3 provider share <55%.
Q4 2027 IDC/Gartner top-3 share sits in 55-70% band (concentrating but below oligopoly threshold).
Q4 2027 IDC/Gartner top-3 share sits in 70-85% band (oligopoly threshold).

tier2_strong.desc: IDC/Gartner enterprise survey shows open-weights models (Llama / Mistral / DeepSeek / Qwen) as production primary at >=25% of enterprises by end 2027.
AWS Bedrock-aggregated frontier-inference revenue exceeds $20B annualized run rate in any quarterly disclosure 2027. Source: AMZN 10-Q.
Azure OpenAI-aggregated frontier-inference revenue exceeds $30B annualized run rate in any quarterly disclosure 2027. Source: MSFT 10-Q.

OpenAI OR Anthropic is acquired by, merged with, or absorbed into a hyperscaler (MSFT/GOOG/AWS) before end 2028. REV4: LR mass redistributed across H3+H4 (acquisition consistent with 70-85% as well as >=85%). Source: SEC + AP/Reuters.

Formal regulatory bifurcation (US restricts US-firm China inference; China prohibits US-firm operation) producing 2 disjoint markets, before 2028. REV4: direction CORRECTED — bifurcation removes Chinese revenue from denominator → US top-3 share rises mechanically → favors H3/H4 not H2. Source: BIS + CAC.

IDC/Gartner top-4-to-top-10 cloud frontier-inference share collectively grows >=5pp YoY in any 2027 quarterly print (concentration moves up middle bracket without crossing oligopoly threshold). Source: IDC.
Combined OpenAI + Anthropic + Google + MSFT AI capex >=$300B annualized run rate sustained through 2027 (capital moat deepening). RENAMED from anti_ — pro-H3/H4 evidence not adversarial.

IDC/Gartner enterprise survey shows open-weights models as production primary at <10% of enterprises through 2027 (consolidation thesis intact). RENAMED from anti_ — pro-H3/H4 evidence not adversarial.

tier3_suggestive.desc: European Commission designates an AI provider as a 'gatekeeper' under DMA (or equivalent AI Act regulatory action) by end 2027. REV4: direction CORRECTED — designation IS evidence concentration occurred → favors H3 not H2. Source: EU OJ.
A new entrant (founded <=2024) reaches top-5 by cloud frontier-inference revenue by end 2027. Source: IDC.

anti_indicators.desc: IDC/Gartner top-3 cloud frontier-inference share DECLINES qoq for 2 consecutive quarters in 2027 (sustained share decline rules out tightening oligopoly thesis). Source: IDC.

actorModel.description: Top-3 cloud frontier-inference revenue share at Q4 2028 emerges from: hyperscaler (AWS+Azure+GCP) capex moats, OpenAI/Anthropic distribution choices, open-weights enterprise penetration, China bifurcation, and EU regulatory action.

msft_azure_openai.name: Microsoft (Azure + OpenAI integration)
msft_azure_openai.role: Largest single cloud frontier-inference revenue line. Azure OpenAI Service is bellwether for hyperscaler-bundled inference dominance.
msft_azure_openai.decisionStyle: Bundling-driven; willing to subsidize inference for Office 365/M365 attach.
biases: Slow to disclose granular Azure OpenAI revenue
filters: MSFT 10-Q segment data, OpenAI usage growth
overrides: DOJ/FTC antitrust action on OpenAI relationship forces restructure

amzn_aws_bedrock.name: Amazon (AWS Bedrock)
amzn_aws_bedrock.role: Multi-model marketplace. Aggregates Anthropic + Meta + others. Market verdict on multi-vendor cloud strategy.
amzn_aws_bedrock.decisionStyle: Platform-neutral framing; revenue measured at gross level.
biases: Underweight customer preference for specific models
filters: AWS quarterly revenue, Anthropic usage trajectory

openai_anthropic.name: OpenAI + Anthropic (frontier labs)
openai_anthropic.role: Acquisition pathway: hyperscaler absorption pushes share toward H4 (>=85%); independent operation supports H2-H3.

open_weights_enterprise.name: Open-Weights Enterprise Adoption (Llama/Mistral/DeepSeek/Qwen)
open_weights_enterprise.role: Determines whether closed-frontier dominance erodes from below. IDC/Gartner enterprise survey is observable.
biases: Optimistic on enterprise willingness to self-host

eu_commission.name: EU Commission (DMA + AI Act gatekeeper)
eu_commission.role: Designation triggers obligations that may constrain consolidation OR confirm it (designation = recognition of dominance).
biases: Anchored to fundamental-rights and competition frameworks
filters: DMA gatekeeper criteria, AI Act enforcement

china_us_bifurcation.name: US BIS + Chinese Cyberspace Admin (bifurcation regulators)
china_us_bifurcation.role: Formal bifurcation removes Chinese revenue from global denominator → mechanically raises US top-3 share. Direction CORRECTED in REV4.

idc_gartner.name: IDC / Gartner (resolution observable)
idc_gartner.role: Q4 2027 frontier-inference revenue share tracker resolves the topic via per_event_member band partition.
idc_gartner.decisionStyle: Methodologically conservative; updates lag market events 60-90 days.

methodology: ACTIONS OVER RHETORIC — Hyperscaler 10-Q segment data is DATA; AI-conference keynote claims are RHETORIC.
PER_EVENT_MEMBER PARTITION — IDC top-3 share quartet (≥85 / 70-85 / 55-70 / <55) is mutex. Engine enforces via shape.

HYPERSCALER CONSOLIDATION CLUSTER — Bedrock + Azure OpenAI revenue indicators share causal_event_id=hyperscaler_inference_consolidation. Co-firing on enterprise procurement substrate, not independent.
IDC SOURCE CONCENTRATION — 6 of 15 indicators trace to IDC/Gartner. Methodology revision is correlated risk; surveyed cluster (#5, #13) shares causal_event_id=idc_enterprise_openweights_survey.

DIRECTION-CORRECTED INDICATORS — REV4 fixed: China bifurcation favors H3/H4 (denominator effect, not H2); EU DMA designation favors H3 (recognition of dominance, not antitrust resistance); acquisition split H3+H4.

idc_gartner_top3.label: IDC/Gartner cloud frontier-inference revenue top-3 share tracker
idc_gartner_top3.note: Resolution observable. 4 top-3 share bands per_event_member under causal_event_id=idc_top3_share_2027. SOURCE-CONCENTRATION risk (6 of 15 indicators).

idc_enterprise_openweights_survey.note: t2_open_weights_enterprise_share_25pct + t2_open_weights_enterprise_below_10 (RENAMED in REV4 from anti_). Shared causal_event_id=idc_enterprise_openweights_survey.

sec_ma_filings.label: SEC filings + AP/Reuters M&A coverage (lab acquisitions)
sec_ma_filings.note: t2_anthropic_or_openai_acquired. REV4 split LR across H3+H4.

bis_cac_china_bifurcation.label: US BIS + Cyberspace Admin China formal market bifurcation rules
bis_cac_china_bifurcation.source: BIS Federal Register + Cyberspace Admin China
bis_cac_china_bifurcation.note: t2_china_market_bifurcation_formal. REV4: direction CORRECTED — favors H3/H4 (denominator effect on global share) not H2.

eu_dma_designations.note: t3_eu_dma_designates_ai_provider. REV4: direction CORRECTED — designation = recognition of dominance, favors H3 not H2.

evidenceLog.text: OpenAI Secures AWS Distribution for Frontier Platform in $110B Multi-Cloud Deal — A $100B+ expansion of OpenAI's AWS commitment plus 2GW Trainium consumption shifts frontier-inference revenue toward the top-3 hyperscalers, supporting the concentrating (50-70%) band.

evidenceLog.text: CoreWeave Surges as Meta and Anthropic Deals Cement 'Neocloud' Dominance in the AI Inference Supercycle — Neocloud (CoreWeave) capturing nine of ten leading model providers and $87.8B backlog is direct contradicting evidence — it pushes frontier-inference share away from top-3 hyperscalers, lowering H2 likelihood.
